source_authority_context.summary: The prior authority condition was valid at bind time, but execution-time evidence freshness is no longer reliable.

execution_context.summary: Execution-time scope and actor remain aligned, but evidence freshness has decayed beyond bounded certainty.

authority_drift.summary: Evidence decay leaves execution-time authority validity unknown without implying any enforcement effect.
limitations: This preview does not resolve uncertainty by granting authority.
